channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joel Embiid struck in face fighting for rebound, misses 2nd half of 76ers' loss to Pacers
item.description: Joel Embiid left the Philadelphia 76ers’ loss to the Indiana Pacers shortly before halftime Friday night after being struck in the face going for a defensive rebound.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn now has a firm target for her return to World Cup ski racing at age 40: next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland. She has a goal, too, and it's not showing up at the starting gate simply to show up.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NBA Cup semifinal matchups in Las Vegas: Thunder-Rockets, Bucks-Hawks
item.description: Winning the NBA Cup won’t bring a championship parade to Oklahoma City or Houston or Atlanta or Milwaukee.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Taylor Swift will only get $10 birthday present from Travis Kelce's dad
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce's father, Ed Kelce, said that he plans to only spend $10 on a gift for Taylor Swift's 35th birthday this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss reveals cancer diagnosis, 6-hour surgery
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss said Friday he is being treated for cancer and is recovering from major surgery. In an appearance on Instagram Live, Moss, aided by a cane, introduced himself as a cancer survivor and thanked his “prayer warriors” for their support.
item.dc:creator: ZACH ALLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros, paying a big price for one of baseball’s best hitters.
item.dc:creator: Jay Cohen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers after his refusal to enter a game, Kyle Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco coach Kyle Shanahan said linebacker De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers moving forward after he refused to enter a game after losing his starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Luke Littler was an unknown a year ago. Now he's making millions and taking darts into mainstream
item.description: Luke Littler was virtually unknown a year ago. Now he is making millions, transcending his sport and is searched for more often on Google than King Charles and the British Prime Minister.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders player Charles Snowden facing misdemeanor DUI charge after Las Vegas arrest
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Las Vegas officers found Raiders football player Charles Snowden “passed out” behind the wheel of a Jeep Cherokee, its engine running as it balanced atop a retaining wall, before his arrest on a misdemeanor charge of driving under the influence of alcohol, according to a police repo
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5
